---
title: "DEVELOP Day at NASA Headquarters"
description: NASA HQ Poster Presentation
image: media/ARCCoverImage.png
---
![Presenting my poster!](media/ARCCoverImage.png)

Out of my four person team at NASA Ames Research Center, I was selected to present our California Coast Ecological Conservation Poster at NASA Headquarters during the 2025 Earth Science DEVELOP Day.
